meaning: adj.轻率的,狂妄的n.狂妄的人(尤指女子)
examples: The madcap can be saved; the self-contemptuous is beyond rescue.
Madcap ciss with her golliwog curls . you had to laugh at her sometimes.
Such madcap denial could perhaps be shrugged off were it not for the simultaneous arrest of Mr Ganic.
So Chipper's a no-go, just the latest weird footnote in the Yankees' madcap spring.
Dunn was also a regular on Michael Bentine's madcap sketch show It's a Square World.
